Hi, I'm Rachana M N

Engineering student at Bangalore Institute of Technology, building at the intersection of deep learning, cognitive radio, and next-generation wireless systems.

Get in touch
About me

Engineering meets intelligence

I'm a third-year Electronics & Telecommunication Engineering student at Bangalore Institute of Technology with a CGPA of 7.6/10. I enjoy working at the boundary of hardware and software — from capturing real-time RF signals with SDR antennas to training CNNs for medical imaging.

My interests span ML/deep learning, signal processing, cognitive radio networks, and 5G/6G concepts. I'm driven by building things that solve real-world problems, whether it's detecting oral cancer earlier or optimising spectrum usage in wireless networks.

Projects

Things I've built

Ongoing

Cognitive Spectrum Sensing for CR Networks

End-to-end hardware + software project for dynamic spectrum management. Used an SDR antenna to capture real-time RF signals, trained ML classifiers (SVM, Decision Tree) to classify frequency bands, and built a web interface to display live spectrum occupancy.

PythonSDRMATLABSVMWeb Dev
⌥ GitHub ▶ Live Demo
Completed

Plant Disease Detection using ML

Detects plant diseases from input images using a trained ML model. Built with a plant disease database and a web interface for real-time image-based diagnosis.

MLImage ClassificationJavaScriptHTML/CSS
⌥ GitHub ▶ Live Demo
Completed

Oral Cancer Detection Using Deep Learning

Designed and compared three CNN architectures — baseline CNN, ResNet, and EfficientNet — for binary classification of oral cancer images. Applied transfer learning and data augmentation. EfficientNet achieved the highest accuracy.

CNNResNetEfficientNetTransfer Learning
Completed

Soil Monitoring & Automated Irrigation (LoRa)

Built a real-time soil moisture monitoring system using LoRa long-range wireless communication. Automated irrigation triggers based on sensor thresholds, optimising water usage in agricultural test conditions.

LoRaIoTEmbedded SystemsSensors
Completed

Signal Processing Lab Experiments

Implemented AM/FM modulation, Nyquist sampling, FFT-based spectrum analysis, and filter design experiments in MATLAB as part of coursework.

MATLABFFTModulationFilter Design
